# komodor_workspace (Data Source)

Get information about a Komodor workspace



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) The ID of the workspace

### Read-Only

- `author_email` (String) The email of the workspace author
- `created_at` (String) The creation timestamp of the workspace
- `description` (String) The description of the workspace
- `last_updated_by_email` (String) The email of the last user who updated the workspace
- `name` (String) The name of the workspace
- `scopes` (List of Object) The scopes of the workspace (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--scopes))
- `updated_at` (String) The last update timestamp of the workspace

<a id="nestedatt--scopes"></a>
### Nested Schema for `scopes`

Read-Only:

- `clusters` (List of String)
- `clusters_patterns` (List of Object) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedobjatt--scopes--clusters_patterns))
- `namespaces` (List of String)
- `namespaces_patterns` (List of Object) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedobjatt--scopes--namespaces_patterns))
- `selectors` (List of Object) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedobjatt--scopes--selectors))
- `selectors_patterns` (List of Object) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedobjatt--scopes--selectors_patterns))

<a id="nestedobjatt--scopes--clusters_patterns"></a>
### Nested Schema for `scopes.clusters_patterns`

Read-Only:

- `exclude` (String)
- `include` (String)


<a id="nestedobjatt--scopes--namespaces_patterns"></a>
### Nested Schema for `scopes.namespaces_patterns`

Read-Only:

- `exclude` (String)
- `include` (String)


<a id="nestedobjatt--scopes--selectors"></a>
### Nested Schema for `scopes.selectors`

Read-Only:

- `key` (String)
- `type` (String)
- `value` (String)


<a id="nestedobjatt--scopes--selectors_patterns"></a>
### Nested Schema for `scopes.selectors_patterns`

Read-Only:

- `key` (String)
- `type` (String)
- `value` (List of Object) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedobjatt--scopes--selectors_patterns--value))

<a id="nestedobjatt--scopes--selectors_patterns--value"></a>
### Nested Schema for `scopes.selectors_patterns.value`

Read-Only:

- `exclude` (String)
- `include` (String)
